title: go
description: the Lisbon Metropolitan Area platform for public transport operational monitoring and public information

title: tidytransit
description: an R package to read, validate, analyse and map GTFS feeds

title: gtfstools
description: an R package to edit and analyse GTFS data

title: transitland-atlas
description: a community-maintained catalog of public transportation GTFS data

title: slopes
description: an R package to calculate slopes of roads, rivers and trajectories

title: gtfsrouter
description: an R package to route and analyse GTFS data

title: osmactive
description: an R package to extract active travel infrastructure from OpenStreetMap data
